extended.autoworkApplyFailed: Terminal created, but AutoWork failed to enable — retry inside the terminal
extended.autoworkDesc: Let automatic tasks drive this terminal by requirement tag (Claude / Codex, including wrappers like stepcode claude)
extended.autoworkRequiresAgent: AutoWork requires a Claude / Codex terminal (including wrappers like stepcode claude)
extended.idmmApplyFailed: Terminal created, but Smart Decision failed to enable — retry inside the terminal
extended.idmmApplyNote: Takes effect as soon as the terminal is created; you can adjust it inside the terminal.
extended.knowledgeConnectNote: Platform-managed terminals inject this automatically; wrappers, custom commands, and external terminals can register the credential-free command in the workspace.
extended.knowledgeDesc: Mount knowledge bases into the workspace for this terminal's agent to search.
extended.subtitle: Expose platform capabilities to the agent CLI launched in this terminal
extended.title: Extended Capabilities

registerKnowledge.cwdRequired: Please select a working directory first
registerKnowledge.modalDesc: Choose a CLI and merge the knowledge MCP command into its config without overwriting existing settings.
registerKnowledge.securityDesc: No port or credential is stored. At startup, the CLI receives workspace-scoped access through a local channel protected for the current OS user; NomiFun must be running.

batchDeleteContent: Delete {{count}} terminal session(s)? Running processes will be terminated.
fallbackShellTip: Kill a stuck Claude / Codex and drop back to a clean shell in place (mashing Ctrl+C also triggers this)
composerPlaceholder: Type a command, then Send to run it in the terminal

create.title: New Terminal
create.subtitle: Pick a working directory and (optionally) an agent to launch.
create.presetHint: Choose an agent CLI (Claude / Codex / Gemini …) as the launch method
create.knowledgePlaceholder: Optional — pick knowledge bases to mount
create.knowledgeHint: Mounted into .nomi/knowledge/ under the working directory; the session reads them as an extended knowledge source.
create.commandHint: You can customize the launch command; it will be injected automatically when the terminal is created.

mcpPanel.description: Templates contain only the launch command, never a port or credential. At startup, external CLIs receive workspace-scoped access through a local channel protected for the current OS user; NomiFun must be running.
mcpPanel.title: Advanced: manual registration for other CLIs / external terminals

knowledge.applyAfterRelaunch: Changes take effect after the session is relaunched.

deleteConfirmContent: Delete this terminal session? The running process will be terminated.

autowork.requiresAgentCli: AutoWork requires an agent CLI terminal (Claude / Codex, including wrappers like stepcode claude)
autowork.terminalExited: Terminal has exited — relaunch to use AutoWork
autowork.fullAutoHint: Not in full-auto mode: injected requirements may stall on approval prompts.
